utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now checking each one in the final package:
1. destination – included and fully specified (Barcelona, Spain).
2. travel_dates – included and fully specified (June 25–June 29, 2024).
3. transportation – included with full details (airline, route, departure/return times, cost).
4. accommodation – included with full details (hotel name, rating, location, amenities, cost).
5. activities – included, multiple activities listed with individual costs.
6. additional_services – included with detailed emergency contacts as requested (includes both contacts specified by the user and an emergency service contact).
7. total_budget – included with a complete cost breakdown (flights, hotel, activities, meals, overall total). All items are fully specified with details and costs where applicable.
